creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-02-08 21:43:08 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    databases            Makefile 
  Added files:
    databases/rubygem-pg Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  rubygem-pg provides the module "pg", a Ruby interface to the
  PostgreSQL Relational Database Management System, which
  supersedes the old "postgres" module.
  
  WWW: http://rubyforge.org/projects/ruby-pg/
  
  PR:             ports/131270
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.733     +1 -0      ports/databases/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/databases/rubygem-pg/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/databases/rubygem-pg/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/databases/rubygem-pg/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +157 -0    ports/databases/rubygem-pg/pkg-plist (new)
